title: Burichi (Bleach)
description: Burichi (Bleach) is a RPG Modpack for players wanting to become a Shinigami, Quincy or Hollow.
body:
![Burichi (Bleach) SS 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Fyxw6Tti/images/7b55f353fd7e4f1e5540a2f3d397761e880dfa46.png)
# Overview
**Burichi (Bleach)** is a fantasy Modpack based on the anime/manga "Burichi". Search the deepest depths of your soul and awaken the spiritual pressure from within. Shinigami, Quincys and Hollows inhabit these dimensions. Call upon your Zanpakutō unlock your swords Shikai and master its Bankai! With a progression system, can you go from human to Head Captain or fail and lose your soul to a Hollow...

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/burichi)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/burichi)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)

# Features
- [✔️] **World Generation** - A vanilla+ world.
- [✔️] **Custom Animations** - Fight at your peak with Bankai but beware each move takes it toll!
- [✔️] **Performance** - Don't let that pesky performance get in the way of your fun! Enjoy a fully optimised pack for all systems, shaders too!
- [✔️] **Bleach Awaken** - Soul reapers, hollows, quincies and more! Fight alongside your Zanpakutō spirit and use the various abilites it reveals to you. Jump between dimensions, the soul society, world of the living and Hueco Mundo are all yours to explore and battle in.

## Screenshots - Check Gallery for more!

### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
